violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops laying with handle in dry drink powders.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Internl milk temperature found at 44.4F, unit temperature at ~46F.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Towels being used for spoon/utensil rest at service counter.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Thermometer not available at table top unit.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Utensils/pitcher stated as washed daily.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer at 3 comp sink a little light- ensure sanitizer is made to 200ppm Quat solution.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Drainboard/rack/table space was insufficient to accommodate equipment/utensils. -Using towels at drain shelf.
